_comment: Product capability content for the public site. Present what the engine does, confidently; keep the granular maturity/limitations nuance in docs/CAPABILITY.md, not here. 'proof' is an optional positive credibility signal shown only where genuinely true. 'run' loads a live scenario in the playground.

capabilities.name: Orbit propagation & GNSS geometry
capabilities.summary: SGP4/SDP4 propagation from real two-line elements or synthetic Walker constellations, with multi-constellation visibility, dilution of precision, and GNSS availability.

capabilities.name: Three-axis strapdown INS
capabilities.summary: Quaternion attitude, WGS-84 NED mechanization, coning and sculling compensation, and a full deterministic IMU error model (scale-factor, misalignment, g-sensitivity, quantization, drift).

capabilities.name: GNSS / INS sensor fusion
capabilities.summary: A 15-state error-state extended Kalman filter with closed-loop feedback that coasts through GNSS outages on a calibrated inertial solution.

capabilities.name: Receiver autonomous integrity (RAIM)
capabilities.summary: Snapshot and solution-separation RAIM with horizontal and vertical protection levels (HPL/VPL), fault detection and identification, and Stanford integrity diagrams.

capabilities.name: Clock holdover, stability & transfer
capabilities.summary: Two-state Kalman holdover, Allan-family stability (ADEV / MDEV / TDEV / HDEV) with confidence intervals, and optical or RF two-way time transfer.

capabilities.name: RINEX & GNSS formats
capabilities.summary: RINEX-3 GPS broadcast-ephemeris ingestion with IS-GPS-200 satellite position and clock evaluation.

capabilities.name: Spoofing & jamming analysis
capabilities.summary: Clock-aided spoof-detectability analysis demonstrated against a configurable time-spoof attack.

trust.reproducible: Deterministic from scenario + seed + engine version; CycloneDX SBOM and SLSA build provenance on every release.
trust.citation: CITATION.cff in the repository; archival DOI via Zenodo.
